# Copilot Instructions — screenpipe

Screen capture and recording utility. Cross-platform desktop app.

## Key Rules
- Privacy: screen capture data is sensitive — flag any code that stores or transmits captured content
- Rust code: follow Rust safety conventions, avoid unsafe blocks without clear justification
- OS compatibility: test changes against Windows, macOS, and Linux code paths
- Tauri app: follow Tauri security model for IPC and file system access

## Token Budget
See conductor-brain repo (CONTEXT_CONTROL.md) for agent delegation rules.
